biography: Milo Machado Graner (born August 31, 2008) is a French actor. In 2023, he starred as Daniel, the visually impaired son of Sandra Voyter, in Justine Triet's courtroom drama Anatomy of a Fall, which won the Palme d'Or at Cannes. He received a number of accolades for his performance, including Critics Choice and Lumières Award nominations.
name: Milo Machado-Graner
